tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The fail-to-pass tests are predominantly text/AST inspection: test_run_url_pattern_matches_run_urls extracts regex from source text and tests it independently (not importing the module), test_resolve_urls_dispatches_run_pattern checks for string 'RUN_URL_PATTERN' and 'get_jobs' in function source text, test_help_text_mentions_run_url scans source lines for substrings, test_skill_md_documents_run_urls checks file content strings. None of them import the module or execute the actual code paths.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation (empty file, pass, return None) would not pass: test_run_url_pattern_matches_run_urls requires a compiled regex named RUN_URL_PATTERN that actually matches specific URLs and captures digit groups; test_run_url_pattern_excludes_job_urls requires it NOT match job URLs; test_resolve_urls_dispatches_run_pattern requires an async function resolve_urls referencing RUN_URL_PATTERN and get_jobs.
